title: TMWIN
description: Tell Me What I Need : Display the litematica material list in the crafting table screen.
body:
# TMWIN: TellMeWhatINeed

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2656294d38bcce4b08dd85ab69f8017a1aed99b6.png)

**A Handy Little Helper for Litematica Projections!**

## Overview

`TMWIN: TellMeWhatINeed` is a simple yet powerful Minecraft mod designed for players using [Litematica](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/litematica). It automatically reads Schematic placements within your render distance and displays their material list right in the crafting table, making it easier than ever to gather resources!~~~~

## Mod Showcase Video

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/QJ_J98CprXM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Key Features
- **Auto-Scan**: Detects Litematica projections in your render distance in real-time.
- ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/170b947d99d4bcc4d9e14c647920ec9fc8d99b25.png)
- **Material Display**: Shows a complete material list directly in the crafting table interface.
- ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d9c9038d24c2f0bee2a820112905f2a0021f2b9.png)
- **Material Breakdown**: Breakdown material into its base material.
- ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12b443c97f21b087242513c166cf0410e614275a.png)
## How to Use

1. Load a Litematica projection in-game.
2. Open a crafting table.
3. Click the button with a blue book icon.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c11c35e3349bac9c1fc181df64a74f59ae6ecc56.png)
4. `TMWIN` will automatically display the materials needed for the projection.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de86290fd7b0681c37c2096504c645fed3c0c325.png)
## Compatibility

- **Minecraft Version**: 1.20.6 ~ 1.21.4 (More versions in development)
- **Required Mods**: Litematica, Fabric API
- **Loader**: Fabric
